intro: Trisepalum strobilaceum is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Trisepalum strobilaceum include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Trisepalum strobilaceum is often used to prepare tea infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are believed to have therapeutic benefits for treating various ailments.
